Class SfsStructureType

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels.SfsModel
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.sfsmodels.data.SfsStructureType
public class SfsStructureType extends SfsModel

    structure_id
     
    String
    structure_type
    One of `nursery`, `breeding`, `mine`, `castle`, `bakery`, `decoration`, `obstacle`, `time_machine`, `happiness_tree` (unity tree), `warehouse`, `hotel`, `torch` (wishing torch), `recording_studio`, `buddy` (glowbe), `fuzer`, `battle_gym`, `crucible`, `awakener`, `attuner`, `synthesizer`, `nucleus`, `dish_harmonizer`, `polarity_amplifier`, `fugue`
    int
    upgrades_to
    Structure type ID that this structure can be upgraded to, or 0 if it can't upgrade
    int

    • structure_type

      public String structure_type
      One of `nursery`, `breeding`, `mine`, `castle`, `bakery`, `decoration`, `obstacle`, `time_machine`, `happiness_tree` (unity tree), `warehouse`, `hotel`, `torch` (wishing torch), `recording_studio`, `buddy` (glowbe), `fuzer`, `battle_gym`, `crucible`, `awakener`, `attuner`, `synthesizer`, `nucleus`, `dish_harmonizer`, `polarity_amplifier`, `fugue`

      public int size_x

      public int size_y

      public int build_time

    • xp

      public int xp

    • movable

      public int movable

    • sellable

      public int sellable

    • upgrades_to

      public int upgrades_to
      Structure type ID that this structure can be upgraded to, or 0 if it can't upgrade

    • allowed_on_island

      public List<Integer> allowed_on_island
      Serialized JSON array of island type IDs

    • extra

      public SFSObject extra
      Contains extra data, whatever "extra" really means. For castles, it has an integer "beds".
